meanings.definition: form into a cylinder by rolling

examples: I am accumulating evidence for the man's unfaithfulness to his wife
She is amassing a lot of data for her thesis
She rolled up a small fortune
He rolled up in a black Mercedes
he bundled up his few possessions

meanings.definition: close (a car window) by causing it to move up, as with a handle
examples: she rolled up the window when it started to rain

meanings.definition: show certain properties when being rolled
